Stella Creasy

Working for Walthamstow

I'm Stella Creasy- I'm the Labour and Cooperative candidate for Walthamstow and have been serving our community since 2010, fighting for our community and our causes. If you would like to sign up for my Working for Walthamstow e-newsletter, please click here to sign up.       

Coping with the Rising Cost of Living

Worried about the Cost of living this Winter? Click here for advice on support available with bills and food, debt advice, and other support.
Read more

Walthamstow stands with Ukraine

Here's how you can help Ukrainian refugees who joined our community in 2022 as a r4esult of the Russian invaision, including supporting local organisations who are working to welcome them.
Read more

Contact Stella

Click here for contact details for Stella
Read more

Help and Advice

Stella and her team can help constituents by raising concerns with the relevant department or official or writing to the relevant Minister, many problems can be solved in this way. Find out more how Stella can help you.
Read more

About Stella

I'm Stella Creasy- since 2010 I've served as the MP for Walthamstow, fighting for our community and our causes. Now I'm asking for your help to continue fighting for our community, our country and our shared future by supporting my re-election campaign in the coming General Election this winter.
Read more

Working for Walthamstow weekly newsletter

Every week Stella produces a newsletter for residents of Walthamstow containing information on local events, activities and issues of interest as well as details of her work as the MP for Walthamstow. Please use the below form to sign up to receive this information - if you have items you wish to submit for inclusion in her newsletter please email text only to [email protected].
Sign Up Now

If you would like to sign up for Stella's Working for Walthamstow e-newsletter, please click here to sign up.
